Looks like this patch has introduced some significant test regressions.

Patch Set 11: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Patch Set 11:

I talked to Chao since he has been working with me on this code. I think the problem is this patch is trying to fix to many things at one time. Currently their are over 40 places in the lustre utility software base that does direct access to proc. I feel we should make a new patch based on Choa's get_proc_path function   
and used that every where. This way we can consolidate the proc handling. The llapi code to [list|get|set] can be handling in another time since that is a much larger project. What do you think about this approach Andreas?

Patch Set 11:

Dmitry is moving this work along further then the current state of this patch. Andreas can you abandon it.

Abandoned

Abandoned in favour of http://review.whamcloud.com/14887 "LU-5030 utils: create llapi_{get,set}_param function"

parents.subject: LU-5986 test: Ensure correct start for conf-sanity/84

commit.subject: LU-5030 utils: create llapi_get_param function
commit.message:
LU-5030 utils: create llapi_get_param function

Abstract out get_param pathname generation so that it is common
between the different parts of liblustreapi by creating a new
function called llapi_get_param. This reduces code duplication
as well as simplifies changes to the /proc parameter location
in the future.

Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Signed-off-by: Chao Wang <chao.ornl@gmail.com>
Change-Id: I17f42b45df5e719129f2ae188da5f65d4a0b03d4
